creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193592
py-django-js-asset-1.1.0.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch from svn that updates www/py-django-js-asset to 1.1.0 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/matthiask/django-js-asset/compare/1.0...1.1

Changes to the port:
- fixed RUN_DEPENDS (was not correctly assigned to Django v1.11)

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
